final:
// // This module is designed to store a value on the falling edge of the clock.
module top_module(
	input wire clk,
	input wire reset,
	input wire enable,
	input wire [31:0]d,
	output reg [31:0]q
);always@(posedge clk or posedge reset ) begin
	if (reset) begin 
		q<=32'd0;
	end else begin 
		if(enable) begin 
			q<=d;
		end 		
	end
end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to store a value on the falling edge of the clock.
